conbody.p: This section provides information about issues that were resolved in release 25.1.

section.title: Resolved Issues in Juniper Cloud-Native Router Release 25.1

li.p: JCNR-10715: SRv6 routes reinstated in cRPD after a restart—The SRv6 routes are now reinstated in cRPD pod upon restart for Cloud-Native Router instances deployed as ingress or egress nodes.

JCNR-10729: All sequences of valid subscription paths in a gNMI-based telemetry request work—When sending gNMI-based telemetry requests to the Cloud-Native Router, all sequences of valid subscription paths work.
